The user is asking me to fix several issues in the scheduling/jadval (schedule) component:

1. Remove the "operator plan" from the "dam kunlari" (days off) section - it should only have the ability to mark days off
2. Fix the day shift (kunduzgi) and night shift (tungi) schedule display - make it look nice
3. Fix the merge/combine button in the schedule - it's not working properly
